rulings.Case Title: PAUL A. VANDER WAERDT VS. CHARLES M. COLLINS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 02, 2008 LINE 2. DEFENDANT CHARLES COLLINS' (AMENDED) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 17, 2008 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order To Have Second Amended X-Complaint Filed
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 02, 2008 LINE 3. DEFENDANTS CHRISTOPHER COOK, LEGACY QUEST AND 101 CONSTRUCTION CO.'S Motion For Order To Have Second Amended CROSS-Complaint Filed IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. PROVEN MANAGEMENT, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Amd Motion To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 02, 2008 LINE 4. CROSS-DEFENDANT TRANSDYN, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration IS DENIED. TRANSDYNE HAS UNREASONABLY DELAYED IN SEEKING ARBITRATION AND HAS PARTICIPATED IN THE LITIGATION SINCE JANUARY 2006 WITHOUT SEEKING TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. TO DO SO NOW ON THE EVE OF TRIAL IS TO SIMPLY ENGAGE IN A LITIGATION TACTIC TO DELAY THE TRIAL. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: MAURICE LAWRENCE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 02, 2008 LINE 5. DEFENDANT FRANK M. BOOTH, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION ALSO RAISES TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT. THERE IS NO REASON TO CONTINUE THE HEARING. THE PARTIES HAVE HAD TIME TO DEPOSE PLAINTIFF. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: MAURICE LAWRENCE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 02, 2008 LINE 5. DEFENDANT CAMPBELL SOUP COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION ALSO RAISES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT ON EXPOSURE BY SWEEPING AND BY PROVIDING ASBESTOS CONTAINING MATERIALS. REQUEST OT CONTINUE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE ARE OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD HUNTER VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 02, 2008 LINE 6. DEFENDANT CERTAINTEED CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE ON APRIL 7, 2008. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: RICK W GRIMSLEY VS. MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 02, 2008 LINE 7. DEFENDANTS MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY AND TRUCK INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS PROCEDURALLY PROPER BUT IT IS DENIED BECAUSE IT REQUIRES THE COURT TO DETERMINE THE NATURE OF PLAINTIFF'S INJURIES AND THE APPLICABLE INSURANCE POLICY/POLICIES AND THESE ARE ISSUES BEYOND THE SCOPE OF THE PLEADINGS. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: RICK W GRIMSLEY VS. MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Take Judicial Ntc Of Court Records
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 02, 2008 LINE 7. PLAINTIFF RICK GRIMSLEY'S MOTION To Take Judicial NOTICE Of Court Records: THE COURT DECLINES TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE INSURANCE POLICIES. THE ISSUE DEFENDANT SEEKS TO RAISE IS BEST ADDRESSED BY A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC DBA GREAT WESTERN VS. MOTHERLODE INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 02, 2008 LINE 8. DEFENDANT MIKE ADAMS'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And To Quash Service Of Summons IS GRANTED. THE EVIDENCE IS THAT PLAINTIFF LACKED ACTUAL NOTICE OF THE SUIT WHEN THE DEFAULT WAS TAKEN AND HAS SOUGHT RELIEF WITHIN THE TIME ALLOWED UNDER C.C.P SECTION 473.5. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID S HANDSHER VS. MARVIN MOORE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 02, 2008 LINE 13. CROSS-DEFENDANT DAVID HANDSHER'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DENIED FOR THE REASONS STATED IN CONNECTION WITH THE DEMURRER. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID S HANDSHER VS. MARVIN MOORE et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 02, 2008 LINE 13. CROSS-DEFENDANT DAVID HANDSHER'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. CROSS-COMPLAINT HAS PLED FACTS GIVING RISE TO CLAIMS BEYOND LEGAL MALPRACTICE AT PARAGRAPHS 29 - 30, 34 -36. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MAY MAINTAIN A CLAIM FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF AS WELL AS ASSERT THE SAME FACTS AS A DEFENSE. =(302/PJM/VC)
